title: No loading screen
description: Removes the annoying bright red Mojang loading screen completely. No compromises
body:
# No loading screen (aka NoMojang)
NoMojang removes the bright red Mojang startup splash screen in Minecraft and replaces it with a clean black loading screen.

## What it does
Hides the red Mojang splash visuals
Keeps normal game loading behavior intact
Shows a small status line in the center: Your game is starting
Shows credit text in the lower-left corner: Nomojang by grizzly dev
Why
The default startup splash can be too bright and distracting.
This mod keeps startup visually calm while preserving vanilla loading flow.

## Compatibility
Minecraft: 1.21.11
Loader: Fabric
Environment: Client-side
## Notes
Safe to use in modpacks
No config required
